name: Volcano Classic - Solid Valve Mouthpiece
summary: The Solid Valve mouthpiece is easily connected to Solid Valve balloon tubes, which can be purchased separately.
description: The Solid Valve mouthpiece is easily connected to Solid Valve balloon tubes, which can be purchased separately. This results in a fully functional balloon that is compatible with both Volcano Classic and Digit models. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
